---
title: "practice"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
library(rvest)
url <- "https://barttorvik.com/team.php?team=Duke"
webpage <- read_html(url) 

print(webpage)
teams <- webpage %>% 
  html_elements("body") 
print(teams)

```

```{r}

t_rank <- function(year = 2026, start_date = NULL, end_date = NULL){
  if ( (is.numeric(year)) && (is.null(start_date)) && (is.null(end_date)))
    {
    year_str <- as.character(year)
    csv_url <- paste0("https://barttorvik.com/trank.php?year=2022&sort=&hteam=&t2value=&conlimit=All&state=All&begin=20211101&end=20220501&top=0&revquad=0&quad=5&venue=H&type=All&mingames=0&csv-1#")
    print(csv_url)
    csv <- read.csv(csv_url)
    data <- data.frame(csv)
    return(data)
  }

}
print(t_rank(year=2023))
```


```{r}
#install.packages("jsonlite")
#library(jsonlite)
json_data <- fromJSON("https://barttorvik.com/trank.php?year=2023&sort=&hteam=&t2value=&conlimit=AE&state=All&begin=20221101&end=20230501&top=0&revquad=0&quad=5&venue=All&type=All&mingames=0#")


```
```{r}
# Install the package if you haven't already
# install.packages("jsonlite")

install.packages(c("jsonlite", "R.utils"))
library(jsonlite)
library(R.utils)

u <- "https://barttorvik.com/timemachine/team_results/20141113_team_results.json.gz"
gz_path <- tempfile(fileext = ".json.gz")
json_path <- tempfile(fileext = ".json")

download.file(u, gz_path, mode = "wb", quiet = TRUE)
gunzip(gz_path, destname = json_path, overwrite = TRUE, remove = FALSE)

x <- fromJSON(json_path)
print(x)


```

```{r}
# Define the file path
file_path <- "https://barttorvik.com/trank.php?year=2022&sort=&hteam=&t2value=&conlimit=All&state=All&begin=20211101&end=20220501&top=0&revquad=0&quad=5&venue=H&type=All&mingames=0&json=1.gz"

# Open a connection to the gzipped file and read the JSON data
# fromJSON automatically handles the data structure conversion
json_data <- fromJSON(gzfile(file_path))

# View the structure of the imported data
str(json_data)
```
```{r}
#date must be after 20141113
#format should be YYYYMMDD
timeMachine_ratings <- function(date){
  dateC <- as.integer(date)
  cur_date <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y%m%d")
  if (dateC >= 20141113 && dateC < cur_date){
    dateChar <- as.character(dateC)
    csv_url <- paste0("https://barttorvik.com/",year_str,"_team_results.csv")
    u <- paste0("https://barttorvik.com/timemachine/team_results/",dateChar,"_team_results.json.gz")
    gz_path <- tempfile(fileext = ".json.gz")
    json_path <- tempfile(fileext = ".json")

    download.file(u, gz_path, mode = "wb", quiet = TRUE)
    gunzip(gz_path, destname = json_path, overwrite = TRUE, remove = FALSE)

    x <- fromJSON(json_path)
    x <- fromJSON(json_path)

    # Force to data.frame (preserve names; don't auto-mangle)
    df <- as.data.frame(x, check.names = FALSE)

    # Your desired headings (tab-separated)
    hdr <- strsplit(
      "rank\tteam\tconf\trecord\tadjoe\toe Rank\tadjde\tde Rank\tbarthag\trank\tproj. W\tProj. L\tPro Con W\tPro Con L\tCon Rec.\tsos\tncsos\tconsos\tProj. SOS\tProj. Noncon SOS\tProj. Con SOS\telite SOS\telite noncon SOS\tOpp OE\tOpp DE\tOpp Proj. OE\tOpp Proj DE\tCon Adj OE\tCon Adj DE\tQual O\tQual D\tQual Barthag\tQual Games\tFUN\tConPF\tConPA\tConPoss\tConOE\tConDE\tConSOSRemain\tConf Win%\tWAB\tWAB Rk\tFun Rk\tadjt",
      "\t",
      fixed = TRUE
    )[[1]]

    # sanity check
    if (ncol(df) != length(hdr)) {
      stop("Column mismatch: df has ", ncol(df), " cols but hdr has ", length(hdr))
    }

    # Make unique because 'rank' appears twice
    colnames(df) <- make.unique(hdr, sep = "_")

    return(df)

  }
  else{
    return("invalid input")
  }
}
print(timeMachine_ratings(20260110))
```

```{r}
library(httr2)

referer <- "https://www.barttorvik.com/gamestat.php?sIndex=0&year=2026&tvalue=Duke&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1"

xhr_url <- "https://www.barttorvik.com/getgamestats.php?sIndex=0&year=2026&tvalue=Duke&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1"

library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)

resp <- request(xhr_url) |>
  req_headers(
    Referer = referer,
    Accept = "*/*"
  ) |>
  req_perform()

txt <- resp_body_string(resp)
print(txt)
# Parse JSON
x <- fromJSON(txt)
print(x)
str(x)



```

```{r}

referer <- "https://www.barttorvik.com/gamestat.php?sIndex=0&year=2026&tvalue=Army&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1"

xhr_url <- "https://www.barttorvik.com/getgamestats.php?sIndex=0&year=2026&tvalue=Army&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1"

library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)

resp <- request(xhr_url) |>
  req_headers(
    Referer = referer,
    Accept = "*/*"
  ) |>
  req_perform()

txt <- resp_body_string(resp)
print(txt)
# Parse JSON
x <- fromJSON(txt)
print(x)
str(x)
```







```{r}
get_games <- function() {
timeout=15
referer <- "https://www.barttorvik.com/gamestat.php?sIndex=0&year=2026&tvalue=All&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1"


xhr_url <- "https://www.barttorvik.com/getgamestats.php?sIndex=0&year=2026&tvalue=All&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1"
  # Column names exactly as you provided (23 columns)
  cols <- c("Date", "Type", "Team", "Conf", "Opp", "Venue", "Result",
    "Adj. O", "Adj. D",
    "O_EFF", "O_eFG%", "O_TO%", "O_Reb%", "O_FTR",
    "D_EFF", "D_eFG%", "D_TO%", "D_Reb%", "D_FTR", "GameScore",
    "Opp_Conf","IDOrder", "Season", "Tempo", "gameID", "Coach", "OppCoach",
    "AvgScoreDiff", "Opp_Barthag", "array", "question"
  )

  # Build request (no User-Agent)
  req <- httr2::request(xhr_url) |>
    httr2::req_headers(Accept = "*/*") |>
    httr2::req_timeout(timeout)

  if (!is.null(referer)) {
    stopifnot(is.character(referer), length(referer) == 1L)
    req <- req |> httr2::req_headers(Referer = referer)
  }

  resp <- req |> httr2::req_perform()
  httr2::resp_check_status(resp)

  txt <- httr2::resp_body_string(resp)

  # Parse JSON; for array-of-arrays this often simplifies to a matrix
  x <- jsonlite::fromJSON(txt, simplifyMatrix = TRUE)

  # Convert to data.frame robustly
  df <- if (is.matrix(x)) {
    as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else if (is.data.frame(x)) {
    as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else if (is.list(x)) {
    as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, x), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    stop("Unexpected JSON structure returned from endpoint.")
  }

  # Validate column count before naming
  if (ncol(df) != length(cols)) {
    stop(
      "Column mismatch: endpoint returned ", ncol(df),
      " columns, but expected ", length(cols), "."
    )
  }

  colnames(df) <- cols
  df2 <- df %>% 
    select(-`question`, -`array`)
  df2
}
print(head(get_games(),1))

```
```{r}
get_games <- function(team= "All", season = 2026, quad = "All") {
  timeout=15
  quadToggle = ""
  if(quad != "All"){
    if(quad == 1 || quad == 2|| quad == 3|| quad == 4){
      quadToggle = paste0("&quad=",quad)
      print(quadToggle)
    }
    else{
      print("incorrent quad input")
    }
  }
  year = as.character(season)
  referer <- paste0("https://www.barttorvik.com/gamestat.php?sIndex=0&year=",year,"&tvalue=",team,"&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1",quadToggle)



  xhr_url <- paste0("https://www.barttorvik.com/getgamestats.php?sIndex=0&year=",year,"&tvalue=",team,"&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1",quadToggle)
  # Column names exactly as you provided (23 columns)
  cols <- c("Date", "Type", "Team", "Conf", "Opp", "Venue", "Result",
            "Adj. O", "Adj. D",
            "O_EFF", "O_eFG%", "O_TO%", "O_Reb%", "O_FTR",
            "D_EFF", "D_eFG%", "D_TO%", "D_Reb%", "D_FTR", "GameScore",
            "Opp_Conf","IDOrder", "Season", "Tempo", "gameID", "Coach", "OppCoach",
            "AvgScoreDiff", "Opp_Barthag", "boxScore", "question"
  )

  # Build request (no User-Agent)
  req <- httr2::request(xhr_url) |>
    httr2::req_headers(Accept = "*/*") |>
    httr2::req_timeout(timeout)

  if (!is.null(referer)) {
    stopifnot(is.character(referer), length(referer) == 1L)
    req <- req |> httr2::req_headers(Referer = referer)
  }

  resp <- req |> httr2::req_perform()
  httr2::resp_check_status(resp)

  txt <- httr2::resp_body_string(resp)

  # Parse JSON; for array-of-arrays this often simplifies to a matrix
  x <- jsonlite::fromJSON(txt, simplifyMatrix = TRUE)

  # Convert to data.frame robustly
  df <- if (is.matrix(x)) {
    as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else if (is.data.frame(x)) {
    as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else if (is.list(x)) {
    as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, x), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    stop("Unexpected JSON structure returned from endpoint.")
  }

  # Validate column count before naming
  if (ncol(df) != length(cols)) {
    stop(
      "Column mismatch: endpoint returned ", ncol(df),
      " columns, but expected ", length(cols), "."
    )
  }

  colnames(df) <- cols
  df2 <- df %>%
    select(-`question`, -`boxScore`, -`Type`)
  return(df2)
}
print(head(get_games(team= "Duke", season = 2025), 30))
```
```{r}

gameBoxScore <- function(team= "All", season = 2026) {
  timeout=5
  year = as.character(season)
  referer <- paste0("https://www.barttorvik.com/gamestat.php?sIndex=0&year=",year,"&tvalue=",team,"&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1")
  
  
  xhr_url <- paste0("https://www.barttorvik.com/getgamestats.php?sIndex=0&year=",year,"&tvalue=",team,"&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1")
  # Column names exactly as you provided (23 columns)
  cols <- c("Date", "Type", "Team", "Conf", "Opp", "Venue", "Result",
            "Adj. O", "Adj. D",
            "O_EFF", "O_eFG%", "O_TO%", "O_Reb%", "O_FTR",
            "D_EFF", "D_eFG%", "D_TO%", "D_Reb%", "D_FTR", "GameScore",
            "Opp_Conf","IDOrder", "Season", "Tempo", "gameID", "Coach", "OppCoach",
            "AvgScoreDiff", "Opp_Barthag", "boxScore", "question"
  )
  
  # Build request (no User-Agent)
  req <- httr2::request(xhr_url) |>
    httr2::req_headers(Accept = "*/*") |>
    httr2::req_timeout(timeout)
  
  if (!is.null(referer)) {
    stopifnot(is.character(referer), length(referer) == 1L)
    req <- req |> httr2::req_headers(Referer = referer)
  }
  
  resp <- req |> httr2::req_perform()
  httr2::resp_check_status(resp)
  
  txt <- httr2::resp_body_string(resp)
  
  # Parse JSON; for array-of-arrays this often simplifies to a matrix
  x <- jsonlite::fromJSON(txt, simplifyMatrix = TRUE)
  print(dim(x))
  y <- jsonlite::fromJSON(x[30], simplifyMatrix = TRUE)
  # Convert to data.frame robustly
  df <- if (is.matrix(x)) {
    as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else if (is.data.frame(x)) {
    as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else if (is.list(x)) {
    as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, x), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    stop("Unexpected JSON structure returned from endpoint.")
  }
  
  # Validate column count before naming
  if (ncol(df) != length(cols)) {
    stop(
      "Column mismatch: endpoint returned ", ncol(df),
      " columns, but expected ", length(cols), "."
    )
  }
  
  colnames(df) <- cols
  df2 <- df %>%
    select(-`question`, -`boxScore`, -`Type`)
  return(df2)
}
print(head(gameBoxScore(team = "Duke"),2))
```


```{r}
timeout=15
season =2026
team = "Duke"
  year = as.character(season)
  referer <- paste0("https://www.barttorvik.com/gamestat.php?sIndex=0&year=",year,"&tvalue=",team,"&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1")
  
  
  xhr_url <- paste0("https://www.barttorvik.com/getgamestats.php?sIndex=0&year=",year,"&tvalue=",team,"&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1")
  # Column names exactly as you provided (23 columns)
  cols <- c("Date", "Type", "Team", "Conf", "Opp", "Venue", "Result",
            "Adj. O", "Adj. D",
            "O_EFF", "O_eFG%", "O_TO%", "O_Reb%", "O_FTR",
            "D_EFF", "D_eFG%", "D_TO%", "D_Reb%", "D_FTR", "GameScore",
            "Opp_Conf","IDOrder", "Season", "Tempo", "gameID", "Coach", "OppCoach",
            "AvgScoreDiff", "Opp_Barthag", "boxScore", "question"
  )
  
  # Build request (no User-Agent)
  req <- httr2::request(xhr_url) |>
    httr2::req_headers(Accept = "*/*") |>
    httr2::req_timeout(timeout)
  
  if (!is.null(referer)) {
    stopifnot(is.character(referer), length(referer) == 1L)
    req <- req |> httr2::req_headers(Referer = referer)
  }
  
  resp <- req |> httr2::req_perform()
  httr2::resp_check_status(resp)
  
  txt <- httr2::resp_body_string(resp)
  
  # Parse JSON; for array-of-arrays this often simplifies to a matrix
  x <- jsonlite::fromJSON(txt, simplifyMatrix = TRUE)

  y <- jsonlite::fromJSON(x[,30], simplifyMatrix = TRUE)
  # Convert to data.frame robustly
  print(typeof(x[,30]))
  print(is.matrix(x[,30]))
  df <- if (is.matrix(x[,30])) {
    as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else if (is.data.frame(x[,30])) {
    as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else if (is.list(x)) {
    as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, x), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    stop("Unexpected JSON structure returned from endpoint.")
  }
  
  # Validate column count before naming
  if (ncol(df) != length(cols)) {
    stop(
      "Column mismatch: endpoint returned ", ncol(df),
      " columns, but expected ", length(cols), "."
    )
  }
  
  colnames(df) <- cols
  df2 <- df %>%
    select(-`question`, -`boxScore`, -`type`)
  return(df2)

```

```{r}
gameBoxScore <- function(team = "All", season = 2026, timeout = 15) {
  
  year <- as.character(season)
  team_q <- utils::URLencode(team, reserved = TRUE)

  base_params <- paste0(
    "sIndex=0",
    "&year=", year,
    "&tvalue=", team_q,
    "&cvalue=All&opcvalue=All&ovalue=All&minwin=All",
    "&mindate=&maxdate=&typev=All&venvalue=All",
    "&minadjo=0&minadjd=200&mintempo=0&minppp=0&minefg=0&mintov=200&minreb=0&minftr=0",
    "&minpppd=200&minefgd=200&mintovd=0&minrebd=200&minftrd=200",
    "&mings=0&mingscript=-100&maxx=100&coach=All&opcoach=All",
    "&adjoSelect=min&adjdSelect=max&tempoSelect=min&pppSelect=min&efgSelect=min",
    "&tovSelect=max&rebSelect=min&ftrSelect=min",
    "&pppdSelect=max&efgdSelect=max&tovdSelect=min&rebdSelect=max&ftrdSelect=max",
    "&gscriptSelect=min&sortToggle=1"
  )

  referer <- paste0("https://www.barttorvik.com/gamestat.php?", base_params)
  xhr_url <- paste0("https://www.barttorvik.com/getgamestats.php?", base_params)

  req <- httr2::request(xhr_url) |>
    httr2::req_headers(
      Accept = "*/*",
      Referer = referer,
      `User-Agent` = "Mozilla/5.0"
    ) |>
    httr2::req_timeout(timeout)

  resp <- httr2::req_perform(req)
  httr2::resp_check_status(resp)

  txt <- httr2::resp_body_string(resp)

  # This endpoint returns a table-like structure; keep it as a data.frame
  x <- jsonlite::fromJSON(txt, simplifyDataFrame = TRUE, simplifyMatrix = TRUE)

  if (is.matrix(x)) x <- as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  if (!is.data.frame(x)) stop("Unexpected JSON structure: expected data.frame/matrix-like object.")

  if (ncol(x) < 30) stop("Unexpected JSON structure: fewer than 30 columns returned; cannot extract column 30.")

  v <- x[[30]]

  if (!is.character(v)) stop("Unexpected JSON structure: column 30 is not character JSON strings.")

  cols <- c(
    "date",
    "question",
    "AwayTeam",
    "HomeTeam",
    "Away Fg made",
    "Away Fg Att",
    "Away 3pt Fg Made",
    "Away 3pt Fg Att",
    "Away FT made",
    "Away FT att",
    "Away Orb",
    "Away Drb",
    "Away Rbs",
    "Away Asts",
    "Away Steals",
    "Away Blocks",
    "Away Turnovers",
    "Away Fouls",
    "Away Score",
    "Home Fg made",
    "Home Fg Att",
    "Home 3pt Fg Made",
    "Home 3pt Fg Att",
    "Home FT made",
    "Home FT att",
    "Home Orb",
    "Home Drb",
    "Home Rbs",
    "Home Asts",
    "Home Steals",
    "Home Blocks",
    "Home Turnovers",
    "Home Fouls",
    "Home Score",
    "Pace",
    "backslash",
    "Repeat1",
    "Repeat2"
  )

  # Parse each JSON string row into a vector
  rows <- lapply(v, function(s) {
    r <- jsonlite::fromJSON(s)
    unlist(r, use.names = FALSE)
  })

  # Validate row widths
  widths <- vapply(rows, length, integer(1))
  if (any(widths != length(cols))) {
    bad <- which(widths != length(cols))[1]
    stop(
      "Parsed row length mismatch. Expected ", length(cols),
      " fields but got ", widths[bad],
      " at row index ", bad, "."
    )
  }

  mat <- do.call(rbind, rows)
  df <- as.data.frame(mat, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  names(df) <- cols

  # Return cleaned version
  df2 <- df |>
    dplyr::select(-question, -backslash, -Repeat1, -Repeat2)

  df2
}


print(gameBoxScore(team = "Duke", season = 2026))
```

```{r}
get_super_sked <- function(year = (as.integer(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y"))))
{
  if (is.numeric(year) && (year >= 2008)){
    year_str <- as.character(year)
    csv_url <- paste0("https://barttorvik.com/",year_str,"_super_sked.csv")
    csv <- read.csv(csv_url)
    data <- data.frame(csv)
    return(data)
  }
  else{
    return(print("Incorrect input! Please enter a year that is after 2007"))
  }
}

print(get_super_sked())
```

```{r}
college_games <- get_super_sked()
library(dplyr)
duke_games <- college_games %>%
  filter(team1 == "Duke" | team2 == "Duke")
print(duke_games)
```
```{r}
?sort()
todayTTQ <- college_games %>%
  filter(Date == "1/23/26") %>%
  arrange(desc(ttq))
print(todayTTQ)
```

```{r}
library(stringr)
strPrac <- duke_games$prediction[1]

columnnOrig <- duke_games$prediction

print(columnnOrig)

splitPred <- str_split(columnnOrig, ", ", simplify = TRUE)

print(class(splitPred))
print(splitPred[1,2])
#splitCol <- c("L", "R") 
newColDF <- data.frame(splitPred)

colDF1 <-data.frame(str_split(newColDF$X1, '-', simplify = TRUE))
colDF2 <-data.frame(str_split(newColDF$X2, ' ', simplify = TRUE))

print(colDF1)
duke_games$predicted_score <- colDF2$X1
duke_games$pctChanceWin <- colDF2$X2
duke_games$favored_team <- colDF1$X1
duke_games$line <- colDF1$X2


print(duke_games)

part1 <- str_split(strPrac, ", ", simplify = TRUE)
print(part1[20])
column1 <- str_split(part1[1], " ", simplify = TRUE)
print(column1)

```

```{r}
college_games <- get_super_sked()
library(dplyr)
duke_games <- college_games %>%
  filter(team1 == "Duke" | team2 == "Duke")
print(duke_games)
print(college_games)
```

```{r}
player_stats <- read.csv("https://barttorvik.com/getadvstats.php?year=2020&start=20200101&end=20200202&csv=1")
playerCols <- c("player_name","team",	"conf",	"GP",	"Min%",	"ORtg",	"usg",	"eFG",	"TS%",	"ORB%",	"DRB%",	"AST%",	"TO%",	"FTM",	"FTA",	"FT%",	"twoPM",	"twoPA",	"twoP%",	"TPM",	"TPA",	"TP%",	"blk%",	"stl%",	"ftr%",	"yr",	"ht",	"num",	"porpag",	"adjoe",	"pfr",	"year",	"pid",	"Hometown",	"Recruit_TRank (0-100)", "ast/tov",	 "rimmade",	 "rimmade+rimmiss", "midmade",	 "midmade+midmiss", "rimmade/(rimidmade+rimmiss)", "midmade/(midmade+midmiss)",	 "dunksmade",	 "dunksmiss+dunksmade",	 "dunksmade/(dunksmade+dunksmiss)", "pick", "drtg",	"adrtg", "dporpag", "stops", "bpm", "obpm",	 "dbpm", "gbpm", "mp", "ogbpm",	"dgbpm",	"oreb",	"dreb",	"treb",	"ast",	"stl","blk",	"pts",	"role","help",	"birthday")
names(player_stats) <- playerCols
print(player_stats)
?arrange
player_stats %>%
  filter(player_name == "Cameron Boozer")

player_stats %>%
  arrange(pick)
print(player_stats)
```

```{r}

url <- "https://www.boydsbets.com/ncaa-basketball-injuries/"
webpage <- read_html(url) 

print(webpage)
teams <- webpage %>% 
  html_elements("body") 

print(teams[[1]])

  
help <- teams[[1]] %>%
  html_element("div.container-fluid.container-home.container-injuries")
print(help)
help %>%
  html_element("div")
```

```{r}
url <- "https://www.scacchoops.com/acc-mens-basketball-injury-report"
webpage <- read_html(url) 

print(webpage)
teams <- webpage %>% 
  html_elements("body") 
print(teams[[1]])

page <- read_html(url)

node <- page |> html_elements("div") |> 
  keep(~ html_text2(.x) == "#9 Khani Rooths")

node
library(stringr)

divs <- page |> html_elements("div")
hit  <- divs[str_detect(html_text2(divs), fixed("#9 Khani Rooths"))]

html_text2(hit)
```

```{r}
install.packages("chromote")
library(chromote)
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

url <- "https://theacc.com/sports/2025/12/29/availability-reporting-mbb.aspx"

b <- ChromoteSession$new()
b$Page$navigate(url)
b$Page$loadEventFired()
Sys.sleep(3)  # give the app time to render

html <- b$Runtime$evaluate("document.documentElement.outerHTML")$result$value
page <- read_html(html)

# You must inspect the rendered DOM to get the right selectors:
# Example skeleton:
players <- page |>
  html_elements("#root > div > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(3) > div:nth-child(4) > div") |>
  html_text2()
print(players)
status <- page |>
  html_elements("CSS_SELECTOR_FOR_STATUS") |>
  html_text2()

tibble(players, status) |>
  filter(str_to_lower(status) != "available")

```


```{r}

library(rvest)
url <- "https://www.covers.com/sport/basketball/ncaab/injuries"
webpage <- read_html(url)

body <- webpage %>%
  html_element("body") 

step <- body %>%
  html_element("#content > div > div > section:nth-child(9)") %>%
  html_table()


#content > div > div > section:nth-child(5)
print(step)
```


```{r}
#consider adding 
PlayerBoxScore <- function(name, season, team){
  ticker = 1
  name_str = gsub(" ", "-", name)
  if(!(is.character(name))){
    print("Please enter a name")
  }
  playerBoxCols <- c("Row",
                     "Gcar",
                     "GameNum",
                     "Date",
                     "Team",
                     "Venue",
                     "Opponent",
                     "TypeGame",
                     "Score",
                     "GS",
                     "MP",
                     "FG",
                     "FGA",
                     "FG%",
                     "3P",
                     "3PA",
                     "3P%",
                     "2P",
                     "2PA",
                     "2P%",
                     "eFG%",
                     "FT",
                     "FTA",
                     "FT%",
                     "ORB",
                     "DRB",
                     "TRB",
                     "AST",
                     "STL",
                     "BLK",
                     "TOV",
                     "PF",
                     "PTS",
                     "GmSc")
  
  cont = TRUE
  while (cont) {
    ticker_str = as.character(ticker)
    year_str = as.character(season)
    url = paste0("https://www.sports-reference.com/cbb/players/",name_str,"-",ticker,"/gamelog/",season,"/")
    webpage <- read_html(url)
    table <- tryCatch(
      {
        webpage %>%
          html_element("tbody") %>%
          html_table(fill = TRUE)
      },
      error = function(e){
        message("Failed to extract table: ", e$message)
        NULL
      }
    
    )
    if(is.null(table)){
      ticker = ticker + 1
    }
    else{
    df_box = as.data.frame(table)
    names(df_box) = playerBoxCols
    if (df_box$Team[1] == team){
      return(df_box)
      cont = FALSE
    }
    }
    Sys.sleep(1.0)
    if(ticker >= 6){
      print("Bad query!")
      break
    }

  }
  
  
}
PlayerBoxScore("Charlie Konen", 2026, "Duke")
```

```{r}

url <- "https://www.covers.com/sport/basketball/ncaab/injuries"
webpage <- read_html(url)
df_team = as.data.frame(table)
injury_cols = c("Player", "POS", "Status", "Description")
df <- data.frame(
  col_A = character(0),
  col_B = character(0),
  col_C = character(0),
  col_D = character(0))
  ticker = 3

for(i in 1:370){
  body <- webpage %>%
    html_element("body")
  child = as.character(ticker)
  search_str = paste0("#content > div > div > section:nth-child(",child,")")
  break_check = FALSE
  table <- tryCatch(
    {
      body %>%
        html_element(search_str) %>%
        html_table()
    },
    error = function(e) {
      message("Stopping loop at ticker = ", ticker)
      break_check = TRUE
    }
  )
  if(break_check == TRUE){
    break
  }

  team <- body %>%
    html_element(paste0("#content > div > div > section:nth-child(",child,") > 
                 div > div > div.row > div.col-xs-5 > div > a")) %>%
    html_text2()
  team_name <- sub(paste0('\n', ".*"), "", team)

df_team = as.data.frame(table)
#concering fix 
  if(nrow(df_team) > 1){

    names(df_team) = injury_cols
    df_team$Team = team_name
    df <- rbind(df, df_team)
  }
  ticker = ticker + 2
  
}

  df_clean <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Description = if_else(
      is.na(Description),
      lead(Description),
      Description
    )
  ) 
df_final <- df_clean %>%
  filter(Description != Player)
  print(df_final)

```

```{r}
injuryList <- function(){

  url <- "https://www.covers.com/sport/basketball/ncaab/injuries"
  webpage <- read_html(url)
  df_team = as.data.frame(table)
  injury_cols = c("Player", "POS", "Status", "Description")
  df <- data.frame(
    col_A = character(0),
    col_B = character(0),
    col_C = character(0),
    col_D = character(0))
  ticker = 3

  for(i in 1:370){
    body <- webpage %>%
      html_element("body")
    child = as.character(ticker)
    search_str = paste0("#content > div > div > section:nth-child(",child,")")
    break_check = FALSE
    table <- tryCatch(
      {
        body %>%
          html_element(search_str) %>%
          html_table()
      },
      error = function(e) {
        message("Stopping loop at ticker = ", ticker)
        break_check = TRUE
      }
    )
    if(break_check == TRUE){
      break
    }

    team <- body %>%
      html_element(paste0("#content > div > div > section:nth-child(",child,") >
                 div > div > div.row > div.col-xs-5 > div > a")) %>%
      html_text2()
    team_name <- sub(paste0('\n', ".*"), "", team)

    df_team = as.data.frame(table)
    #concering fix
    if(nrow(df_team) > 1){

      names(df_team) = injury_cols
      df_team$Team = team_name
      df <- rbind(df, df_team)
    }
    ticker = ticker + 2

  }

  df_clean <- df %>%
    mutate(
      Description = if_else(
        is.na(Description),
        lead(Description),
        Description
      )
    )
  df_final <- df_clean %>%
    filter(Description != Player)

  return(df_final)
}
print(injuryList())

```

```{r}
#consider adding
PlayerBoxScore <- function(name, season, team){
  ticker = 1
  name_str = gsub(" ", "-", name)
  if(!(is.character(name))){
    print("Please enter a name")
  }
  playerBoxCols <- c("Row",
                     "Gcar",
                     "GameNum",
                     "Date",
                     "Team",
                     "Venue",
                     "Opponent",
                     "TypeGame",
                     "Score",
                     "GS",
                     "MP",
                     "FG",
                     "FGA",
                     "FG%",
                     "3P",
                     "3PA",
                     "3P%",
                     "2P",
                     "2PA",
                     "2P%",
                     "eFG%",
                     "FT",
                     "FTA",
                     "FT%",
                     "ORB",
                     "DRB",
                     "TRB",
                     "AST",
                     "STL",
                     "BLK",
                     "TOV",
                     "PF",
                     "PTS",
                     "GmSc")

  cont = TRUE
  while (cont) {
    ticker_str = as.character(ticker)
    year_str = as.character(season)
    url = paste0("https://www.sports-reference.com/cbb/players/",name_str,"-",ticker,"/gamelog/",season,"/")
    webpage <- read_html(url)
    table <- tryCatch(
      {
        webpage %>%
          html_element("tbody") %>%
          html_table(fill = TRUE)
      },
      error = function(e){
        message("Failed to extract table: ", e$message)
        NULL
      }

    )
    if(is.null(table)){
      ticker = ticker + 1
    }
    else{
      df_box = as.data.frame(table)
      print(df_box)
      names(df_box) = playerBoxCols
      if (df_box$Team[1] == team){
        return(df_box)
        cont = FALSE
      }
    }
    Sys.sleep(1.0)
    if(ticker >= 6){
      print("Bad query!")
      break
    }

  }


}


super_sked <- get_super_sked()


dateC <- as.integer(date)

d <- Sys.Date()
today <- paste0(
  as.integer(format(d, "%m")), "/",
  as.integer(format(d, "%d")), "/",
  format(d, "%y")
)


today_sked <- super_sked %>%
  filter(today == Date)
print(today_sked)
```


```{r}
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(tibble)

scrape_ncaa_game_ids <- function(
  season_ids,
  #start_mmdd = "10-10",
  start_mmdd = "11-11",
  #end_mmdd   = "03-08",
  end_mmdd   = "11-18",
  sleep_sec  = 1
) {

  season_map <- tibble(
    season_id = c(18703, 18403, 18221),
    season = c("2025-26", "2024-25", "2023-24")
  )

  results <- list()

  for (sid in season_ids) {

    season_label <- season_map %>%
      filter(season_id == sid) %>%
      pull(season)

    if (length(season_label) == 0) next

    start_year <- as.integer(substr(season_label, 1, 4))
    end_year   <- start_year + 1

    dates <- seq.Date(
      from = as.Date(paste0(start_year, "-", start_mmdd)),
      #make sure to change back to end_year
      to   = as.Date(paste0(start_year, "-", end_mmdd)),
      by   = "day"
    )

    for (d in dates) {

      # ---- FORCE DATE CLASS + SAFE FORMAT ----
      d_date  <- as.Date(d, origin = "1970-01-01")
      date_str <- strftime(d_date, "%m/%d/%Y")
      date_url <- URLencode(date_str)

      url <- paste0(
        "https://stats.ncaa.org/season_divisions/",
        sid,
        "/livestream_scoreboards?utf8=%E2%9C%93&season_division_id=&game_date=",
        date_url,
        "&conference_id="
      )

      message("Scraping: ", season_label, " | ", date_str)

      page <- tryCatch(read_html(url), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(page)) {
        Sys.sleep(sleep_sec)
        next
      }

      game_ids <- page %>%
        html_elements("tr[id^='contest_']") %>%
        html_attr("id") %>%
        str_remove("^contest_")

      if (length(game_ids) > 0) {
        print(game_ids)
        results[[length(results) + 1]] <- tibble(
          date = rep(d_date, length(game_ids)),
          game_id = as.character(game_ids),
          season_id = sid,
          season = season_label
        )
      }

      Sys.sleep(sleep_sec)
    }
  }

  bind_rows(results)
}



#season_ids <- c(18703, 18403, 18221)
season_ids <- c(18703)
games_df <- scrape_ncaa_game_ids(
  season_ids = season_ids,
  sleep_sec = 1
)

glimpse(games_df)

```

```{r}
library(konenMCBB)
library(usethis)

#season_ids <- c(18703, 18403, 18221)
season_ids <- c(18221)

ncaa_game_ids_2023_24 <- scrape_ncaa_game_ids(
  season_ids = season_ids,
  sleep_sec = 1
)

# Save into package
usethis::use_data(
  ncaa_game_ids_2023_24,
  overwrite = TRUE,
  compress = "xz"
)

```

```{r}
url <- "https://stats.ncaa.org/contests/6426795/box_score"

print(page)
circles <- page %>%
  html_element("#court")

circle_data <- circles %>%
  html_attrs() %>%
  bind_rows()
#court

print(circle_data)

print(circles)
```
```{r}
library(rvest)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

url <- "https://www.espn.com/mens-college-basketball/scoreboard/_/date/20130213/group/50"
page <- read_html(url)

game_ids <- page %>%
  html_elements("a") %>%
  html_attr("href") %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  keep(~ str_detect(.x, "/gameId/")) %>%
  str_extract("(?<=gameId/)\\d+") %>%
  unique()

game_ids
```
```{r}
url <- "https://www.ncaa.com/game/6503029/play-by-play"
page <- read_html(url)

check <- page %>%
  html_element("body")
final <- check %>%
  html_elements("table")
print(final)
?html_attr
#gamecenterAppContent > div > div.play-by-play-period.open > div.play-by-play-period-table > table
print(page)
print(check)


```





```{r}
# Install the package if you haven't already
 install.packages("pdftools")

library(pdftools)

# Specify the path to your PDF file
pdf_file <- "http://fs.ncaa.org/Docs/stats/m_basketball_RB/2024/Attend.pdf"

# Extract text
text_content <- pdf_text(pdf_file)

# The result is a character vector where each element is a page
# You can view the first page's text
cat(text_content[1])
print(text_content[5])



```
```{r}

library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

get_ncaa_pbp <- function(game_id) {

  base_url <- "https://sdataprod.ncaa.com/"

  query_url <- paste0(
    base_url,
    "?meta=NCAA_GetGamecenterPbpBasketballById_web",
    "&extensions={%22persistedQuery%22:{%22version%22:1,",
    "%22sha256Hash%22:%226b1232714a3598954c5bacabc0f81570e16d6ee017c9a6b93b601a3d40dafb98%22}}",
    "&variables={%22contestId%22:%22", game_id, "%22,%22staticTestEnv%22:null}"
  )

  res <- GET(
    query_url,
    add_headers(
      Accept = "application/json",
      `User-Agent` = "Mozilla/5.0",
      Referer = paste0("https://www.ncaa.com/game/", game_id, "/play-by-play")
    )
  )

  stop_for_status(res)

  txt <- content(res, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  j <- fromJSON(txt, flatten = TRUE)

  return(j)
}


```

```{r}
pbp_to_df <- function(j) {

  j$data$playbyplay$periods %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    select(periodNumber, playbyplayStats) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(playbyplayStats) %>%
    select(
      period = periodNumber,
      clock,
      teamId,
      isHome,
      homeScore,
      visitorScore,
      eventDescription
    )
}


pbp_raw <- get_ncaa_pbp("6503029")

pbp_df <- pbp_to_df(pbp_raw)

glimpse(pbp_df)
head(pbp_df, 10)

```
```{r}



get_ncaa_boxScore <- function(game_id) {

  base_url <- "https://sdataprod.ncaa.com/"

  query_url <- paste0(base_url,"?meta=NCAA_GetGamecenterBoxscoreBasketballById_web&extensions={%22persistedQuery%22:{%22version%22:1,%22sha256Hash%22:%224a7fa26398db33de3ff51402a90eb5f25acef001cca28d239fe5361315d1419a%22}}&variables={%22contestId%22:%22",game_id,"%22,%22staticTestEnv%22:null}")

  res <- GET(
    query_url,
    add_headers(
      Accept = "application/json",
      `User-Agent` = "Mozilla/5.0",
      Referer = paste0("https://www.ncaa.com/game/", game_id, "/boxscore")
    )
  )

  stop_for_status(res)

  txt <- content(res, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  j <- fromJSON(txt, flatten = TRUE)

  return(j)
}


```

```{r}
box_to_df <- function(j) {

  j$data$boxscore$teamBoxscore %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    select(teamId, playerStats) %>%
    tidyr::unnest(playerStats) %>%
    select(
          team_id = teamId,
           number,
           firstName,
           lastName,
           position,
           minutesPlayed,
           year,
           elig,
           starter,
           fieldGoalsMade,
           fieldGoalsAttempted,
           freeThrowsMade,
           freeThrowsAttempted,
           threePointsMade,
           threePointsAttempted,
           offensiveRebounds,
           totalRebounds,
           assists,
           turnovers,
           personalFouls,
           steals,
           blockedShots,
           points
    )
}


box_raw <- get_ncaa_boxScore("6503029")

box_df <- box_to_df(box_raw)

glimpse(box_df)
head(box_df, 10)
```
```{r}
check <- get_super_sked()
dayCast <- function(year = as.integer(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y"))) {

  df <- get_super_sked(year)
  df$Date <- as.Date(df$Date, format = "%m/%d/%y")
  slate <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(Date == Sys.Date(),
                  gp == 0)

  if (nrow(slate) == 0) {
    return("No games scheduled for today.")
  }

  slate %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      Matchup = matchup,
      Line = paste0(favored_team, " ", line),
      Predicted_score = predicted_score,
      WinProb = pctChanceWin,
      TTQ = round(ttq, 1),
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(desc(TTQ))
}


```

```{r}

espn_summary_save <- function(event_id, path = "espn_raw") {

  dir.create(path, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  base_url <- "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/basketball/mens-college-basketball/summary"
  
  response <- GET(
    url = base_url,
    query = list(event = event_id)
  )
  
  stop_for_status(response)
  
  json_text <- content(response, "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  
  write(
    json_text,
    file = file.path(path, paste0(event_id, ".json"))
  )
}
library(httr)
espn_summary_save("401820724")
read_espn_summary <- function(event_id, path = "espn_raw") {
  
  file_path <- file.path(path, paste0(event_id, ".json"))
  
  fromJSON(file_path, simplifyVector = FALSE)
}

library(jsonlite)
game <- read_espn_summary("401820724")
print(game['pickcenter'])
```


```{r}
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)

espn_team_boxscore <- function(game) {
  
  map_dfr(game$boxscore$teams, function(team_obj) {
    
    team_info <- team_obj$team
    
    # Convert statistics list into named vector
    stats_vec <- setNames(
      sapply(team_obj$statistics, function(s) s$displayValue),
      sapply(team_obj$statistics, function(s) s$name)
    )
    
    tibble(
      teamId = team_info$id,
      teamName = team_info$displayName,
      abbreviation = team_info$abbreviation,
      homeAway = team_obj$homeAway
    ) %>%
      bind_cols(as_tibble_row(stats_vec))
  })
}
team_box_df <- espn_team_boxscore(game)
print(team_box_df)

```
```{r}
espn_player_boxscore <- function(game) {
  
  map_dfr(game$boxscore$players, function(team_block) {
    
    team_info <- team_block$team
    stat_block <- team_block$statistics[[1]]
    
    stat_keys <- stat_block$keys
    
    map_dfr(stat_block$athletes, function(player) {
      
      # Skip players with no stats (DNP)
      if (length(player$stats) == 0) return(NULL)
      
      stats_vec <- setNames(player$stats, stat_keys)
      
      tibble(
        teamId = team_info$id,
        teamName = team_info$displayName,
        playerId = player$athlete$id,
        playerName = player$athlete$displayName,
        jersey = player$athlete$jersey,
        position = player$athlete$position$abbreviation,
        starter = player$starter,
        didNotPlay = player$didNotPlay,
        ejected = player$ejected
      ) %>%
        bind_cols(as_tibble_row(stats_vec))
    })
  })
}

player_box_df <- espn_player_boxscore(game)
print(player_box_df)

```
```{r}
library(purrr)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)

espn_pickcenter_df <- function(game) {
  
  if (is.null(game$pickcenter)) return(NULL)
  
  map_dfr(game$pickcenter, function(p) {
    
    tibble(
      providerId = p$provider$id,
      providerName = p$provider$name,
      
      details = p$details,
      overUnder = p$overUnder,
      spread = p$spread,
      
      overOdds = p$overOdds,
      underOdds = p$underOdds,
      
      # Away odds
      awayTeamId = p$awayTeamOdds$teamId,
      awayMoneyline = p$awayTeamOdds$moneyLine,
      awaySpreadOdds = p$awayTeamOdds$spreadOdds,
      awayFavorite = p$awayTeamOdds$favorite,
      awayFavoriteOpen = p$awayTeamOdds$favoriteAtOpen,
      
      # Home odds
      homeTeamId = p$homeTeamOdds$teamId,
      homeMoneyline = p$homeTeamOdds$moneyLine,
      homeSpreadOdds = p$homeTeamOdds$spreadOdds,
      homeFavorite = p$homeTeamOdds$favorite,
      homeFavoriteOpen = p$homeTeamOdds$favoriteAtOpen,
      
      # Closing moneyline
      homeMoneylineClose = p$moneyline$home$close$odds,
      homeMoneylineOpen = p$moneyline$home$open$odds,
      awayMoneylineClose = p$moneyline$away$close$odds,
      awayMoneylineOpen = p$moneyline$away$open$odds,
      
      # Spread lines
      homeSpreadClose = p$pointSpread$home$close$line,
      homeSpreadOpen = p$pointSpread$home$open$line,
      awaySpreadClose = p$pointSpread$away$close$line,
      awaySpreadOpen = p$pointSpread$away$open$line,
      
      # Total lines
      totalOverClose = p$total$over$close$line,
      totalOverOpen = p$total$over$open$line,
      totalUnderClose = p$total$under$close$line,
      totalUnderOpen = p$total$under$open$line
    )
  })
}
pickcenter_df <- espn_pickcenter_df(game)
print(pickcenter_df)
```

```{r}
game <- read_espn_summary("401820724")
game_info_df <- as.data.frame(game[["gameInfo"]])
print(game_info_df)

game_info_cols <- c("venue_id",
                    "venue_guid",
                    "venueName",
                    "venueCity",
                    "venueState",
                    "grass",
                    "venueImage",
                    "imageW",
                    "imageH",
                    "imageAlt",
                    "imageRes",
                    "imageDay",
                    "attendance",
                    "officialName1",
                    "officialDisplay1",
                    "officialPos1",
                    "officialPosDisplay1",  
                    "official_id1",
                    "official_order1",
                    "officialName2",
                    "officialDisplay2",
                    "officialPosDisplay2",  
                    "officialPos",
                    "official_id2",
                    "official_order2", 
                    "officialName3",
                    "officialDisplay3",
                    "officialPosDisplay3",                      
                    "officialPos",
                    "official_id3",
                    "official_order3"                
                    )
names(game_info_df) <-game_info_cols
print(game_info_df)
```

```{r}

win_prob_df <- data.frame(
  homeWinPercentage = numeric(0),
  tiePercentage = numeric(0),
  playId = character(0)
)
for (n in game[["winprobability"]]){
  temp_df <- data.frame(
  homeWinPercentage = n$homeWinPercentage,
  tiePercentage = n$tiePercentage,
  playId = n$playId    
  )
  win_prob_df <- rbind(win_prob_df,temp_df)
}
print(win_prob_df)
```

```{r}


library(purrr)
library(dplyr)

espn_pbp_df <- map_dfr(game$plays, function(n) {
  
  # Safely extract participant IDs
  participant_ids <- if (!is.null(n$participants)) {
    as.character(unlist(lapply(n$participants, function(p) p$athlete$id)))
  } else {
    character(0)
  }
  
  # Ensure at least length 2
  participant_ids <- c(participant_ids, NA, NA)
  
  tibble(
    playId = as.character(n$id),
    sequenceNumber = as.character(n$sequenceNumber),
    playTypeId = as.character(n$type$id),
    playType = as.character(n$type$text),
    text = as.character(n$text),
    awayScore = as.numeric(n$awayScore),
    homeScore = as.numeric(n$homeScore),
    period = as.numeric(n$period$number),
    periodDisplay = as.character(n$period$displayValue),
    clock = as.character(n$clock$displayValue),
    scoringPlay = as.logical(n$scoringPlay),
    scoreValue = as.numeric(n$scoreValue),
    teamId = as.character(n$team$id),
    wallClock = as.character(n$wallclock),
    shootingPlay = as.logical(n$shootingPlay),
    xCoordinate = as.numeric(n$coordinate$x),
    yCoordinate = as.numeric(n$coordinate$y),
    pointsAttempted = as.numeric(n$pointsAttempted),
    shortDescription = as.character(n$shortDescription),
    
    participant1Id = participant_ids[1],
    participant2Id = participant_ids[2]
  )
})

espn_pbp_df %>%
  filter(scoringPlay == TRUE) %>%
  
  select(xCoordinate, yCoordinate, text, shortDescription)

shotDistance <- function(x, y){
  euclidean_dist <- function(p1, p2) {
  sqrt(sum((p1 - p2)^2))
  }
  basket <- c(25,0)
  shot <- c(x,y)
  distance <- euclidean_dist(basket, shot)
  return(distance)
}
espn_pbp_df <- espn_pbp_df %>%
  mutate(
    shotDistance = ifelse(
      shootingPlay == TRUE,
      shotDistance(xCoordinate, yCoordinate),
      NA_real_
    )
  )
espn_pbp_df <- espn_pbp_df %>%
  mutate(
    shotDistance = ifelse(shootingPlay == TRUE, sqrt((xCoordinate - 25)^2 + yCoordinate^2), NA_real_)
  )


espn_pbp_df %>%
  filter(shootingPlay == TRUE) %>%
  group_by(teamId) %>%
  summarise(avg_shotDist = mean(shotDistance, na.rm = TRUE))
            
print(espn_pbp_df)
library(tidyverse)
ggplot(espn_pbp_df, aes(x = shotDistance)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, color = "white", fill = "skyblue") +
  facet_wrap(~ teamId)



```


```{r}
espn_summary_save("401825518")

game <- read_espn_summary("401825518")
pbp <- get_espn_pbp(game)
player_box_df <- 
clock_to_seconds <- function(period, clock_str) {
  if (is.na(clock_str) || is.na(period)) return(NA_real_)
  
  parts <- strsplit(clock_str, ":")[[1]]
  if (length(parts) != 2) return(NA_real_)
  
  minutes <- as.numeric(parts[1])
  seconds <- as.numeric(parts[2])
  if (is.na(minutes) || is.na(seconds)) return(NA_real_)
  
  remaining <- minutes * 60 + seconds
  period_length <- 20 * 60  # NCAA: 20 min halves
  
  elapsed <- (period - 1) * period_length + (period_length - remaining)
  return(elapsed)
}

build_rotation_stints <- function(pbp_df, player_box_df) {
  
  cat("\n=== Building Rotation Stints ===\n\n")

  pbp_df <- pbp_df %>%
    mutate(
      teamId = as.character(teamId),
      participant1Id = as.character(participant1Id),
      gameSeconds = mapply(clock_to_seconds, period, clock)
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(gameSeconds)) %>%
    arrange(gameSeconds)
  
  player_box_df <- player_box_df %>%
    mutate(
      teamId = as.character(teamId),
      playerId = as.character(playerId)
    )
  

  
  starters <- player_box_df %>%
    filter(starter == TRUE) %>%
    select(teamId, playerId)
  
  starter_check <- starters %>% count(teamId)
  if (any(starter_check$n != 5)) {
    cat("⚠️  Starter counts:\n")
    print(starter_check)
    stop("Each team must have exactly 5 starters")
  }
  
  teams <- unique(starters$teamId)
  cat(sprintf("Teams: %s\n", paste(teams, collapse=", ")))
  

  
  cat("\nProcessing substitutions...\n")
  
  subs <- pbp_df %>%
    filter(playTypeId == "584")
  
  cat(sprintf("Found %d substitution rows\n", nrow(subs)))

  sub_groups <- subs %>%
    group_by(teamId, period, clock) %>%
    summarise(
      gameSeconds = first(gameSeconds),
      n_players = n(),
      players = list(participant1Id[!is.na(participant1Id)]),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(gameSeconds)
  
  cat(sprintf("Grouped into %d substitution events\n", nrow(sub_groups)))
  
  # Show distribution
  size_dist <- sub_groups %>% count(n_players)
  cat("\nSubstitution event sizes:\n")
  print(size_dist)

  
  on_floor <- starters %>%
    group_by(teamId) %>%
    summarise(players = list(playerId), .groups = "drop") %>%
    deframe()
  
  start_times <- list()
  for (team in teams) {
    start_times[[team]] <- setNames(
      rep(0, length(on_floor[[team]])),
      on_floor[[team]]
    )
  }
  
  stints <- list()
  valid_subs <- 0
  invalid_subs <- 0

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(sub_groups))) {
    
    sub <- sub_groups[i, ]
    team <- sub$teamId
    players <- unlist(sub$players)
    n_players <- length(players)
    
    if (is.null(on_floor[[team]])) {
      invalid_subs <- invalid_subs + 1
      next
    }
    
    current <- on_floor[[team]]
    
    # Separate who's going out vs coming in
    going_out <- players[players %in% current]
    coming_in <- players[!players %in% current]
    
    # Must have equal numbers going out and coming in
    # And must be an even total (2, 4, 6, etc.)
    if (length(going_out) == length(coming_in) && 
        length(going_out) > 0 && 
        n_players %% 2 == 0) {
      
      valid_subs <- valid_subs + 1
      
      # Show first few events
      if (valid_subs <= 5) {
        cat(sprintf("  Event #%d (t=%.1f): Team %s - %d player(s) out, %d in\n",
                    valid_subs, sub$gameSeconds, team, 
                    length(going_out), length(coming_in)))
        cat(sprintf("    OUT: %s\n", paste(going_out, collapse=", ")))
        cat(sprintf("    IN:  %s\n", paste(coming_in, collapse=", ")))
      }
      
      # Record stints for all players going out
      for (player_out in going_out) {
        stints[[length(stints) + 1]] <- tibble(
          teamId = team,
          playerId = player_out,
          startTime = start_times[[team]][player_out],
          endTime = sub$gameSeconds
        )
      }
      
      # Update floor: remove all going out, add all coming in
      on_floor[[team]] <- setdiff(current, going_out)
      on_floor[[team]] <- c(on_floor[[team]], coming_in)
      
      # Update start times: remove outgoing, add incoming
      for (player_out in going_out) {
        start_times[[team]] <- start_times[[team]][names(start_times[[team]]) != player_out]
      }
      for (player_in in coming_in) {
        start_times[[team]][player_in] <- sub$gameSeconds
      }
      
      # Verify we still have 5 on floor
      if (length(on_floor[[team]]) != 5) {
        cat(sprintf("      WARNING: Team %s now has %d players on floor!\n", 
                    team, length(on_floor[[team]])))
      }
      
    } else {
      invalid_subs <- invalid_subs + 1
      if (invalid_subs <= 3) {
        cat(sprintf("    Event #%d invalid: %d out, %d in (total %d players)\n",
                    i, length(going_out), length(coming_in), n_players))
      }
    }
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("\nProcessed: %d valid, %d invalid substitution events\n", 
              valid_subs, invalid_subs))
  

  
  game_end <- max(pbp_df$gameSeconds, na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("Game duration: %.1f minutes\n", game_end/60))
  
  for (team in teams) {
    for (player in names(start_times[[team]])) {
      stints[[length(stints) + 1]] <- tibble(
        teamId = team,
        playerId = player,
        startTime = start_times[[team]][player],
        endTime = game_end
      )
    }
  }
  
  
  result <- bind_rows(stints) %>%
    mutate(minutes = (endTime - startTime) / 60) %>%
    arrange(teamId, playerId, startTime)
  
  cat(sprintf("\n✓ Generated %d rotation stints\n\n", nrow(result)))
  
  return(result)
}

summarize_player_minutes <- function(rotation_df, player_box_df = NULL) {
  summary <- rotation_df %>%
    group_by(teamId, playerId) %>%
    summarise(
      stints = n(),
      totalMinutes = sum(minutes, na.rm = TRUE),
      avgStintMinutes = mean(minutes, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(teamId, desc(totalMinutes))
  
  if (!is.null(player_box_df)) {
    player_info <- player_box_df %>%
      select(playerId, playerName) %>%
      mutate(playerId = as.character(playerId)) %>%
      distinct()
    
    summary <- summary %>%
      left_join(player_info, by = "playerId") %>%
      select(teamId, playerId, playerName, everything())
  }
  
  return(summary)
}



rotation_stints <- build_rotation_stints(
  pbp_df = espn_pbp_df,
  player_box_df = player_box_df
)

cat("=== ROTATION STINTS (First 20) ===\n")
print(head(rotation_stints, 20))

cat("\n=== PLAYER MINUTES SUMMARY ===\n")
player_minutes <- summarize_player_minutes(rotation_stints, player_box_df)
print(player_minutes)

# Validation against box score
if ("minutes" %in% names(player_box_df)) {
  cat("\n=== VALIDATION vs BOX SCORE ===\n")
  validation <- player_minutes %>%
    left_join(
      player_box_df %>% 
        select(playerId, boxMinutes = minutes) %>%
        mutate(
          playerId = as.character(playerId),
          boxMinutes = as.numeric(boxMinutes)
        ),
      by = "playerId"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      calculatedMin = round(totalMinutes, 1),
      difference = round(totalMinutes - boxMinutes, 1),
      matchesBox = abs(difference) <= 1  # Within 1 minute tolerance
    ) %>%
    select(playerName, calculatedMin, boxMinutes, difference, matchesBox) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(difference)))
  
  print(validation, n = 20)
  
  matches <- sum(validation$matchesBox, na.rm = TRUE)
  total <- nrow(validation)
  cat(sprintf("\n✓ %d/%d players match box score (±1 min)\n", matches, total))
}
```

```{r}
konenMCBB:::.espn_process_day(date = "2024-11-12", season = "2024-25")
konenMCBB:::.espn_process_day(date = "2024-11-13", season = "2024-25")

espn_rankings_summary(season = "2024-25", date = "2024-11-14")
```

```{r}
options(konenMCBB.espn_db_path = "data/espn_db")
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
url <- "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/basketball/mens-college-basketball/summary?event=401253881"
response <- GET(url)
stop_for_status(response) 
status_code(response)
json_text <- content(response, "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
data_list <- fromJSON(json_text)
print(data_list)
```

```{r}
options(konenMCBB.espn_db_path = "data/espn_db")
library(konenMCBB)

rank_tbl <- espn_rankings_summary(
  season = "2024-25",
  date = "2025-01-20",
  use_incremental = TRUE,
  save_state = TRUE
)

# See all columns
names(rank_tbl)

# View just those advanced/ranking columns
rank_tbl[, c(
  "team_name",
  "off_eff","def_eff","net_eff","eff",
  "pace","ftar","fgar","threepar","pct_3pa",
  "fg_pct","threep_pct","ft_pct","sos_eff",
  "adj_off_eff","adj_def_eff","adj_net_eff",
  "avg_shot_distance","pct_close_range","pct_mid_range","pct_three_profile",
  "shot_attempts","close_range_attempts","mid_range_attempts","three_point_attempts_profile",
  "rank_win_pct","rank_adj_net","rank_adj_off","rank_adj_def","ranking_score","ranking"
)] |> head(25)
rank_tbl <- espn_rankings_summary(
  season = "2024-25",
  date = "2025-01-20",
  base_path = "data/espn_db",
  use_incremental = FALSE,
  save_state = TRUE
)
print(head(rank_tbl,5))
espn_process_
rank_tbl <- espn_rankings_summary(
  season = "2024-25",
  date = "2025-01-21",
  base_path = "data/espn_db",
  use_incremental = TRUE,
  save_state = TRUE
)
print(`2025-11-16`[['rankings']])
```

```{r}
install.packages("BART")
??BART
```
